title: Owned Inspection, Ordering, Release, and Collection Integrity · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Collection Sequence Tests
summary: Inspect silently falls back to the network, list order changes with map iteration, release deletes before confirmation, and aliases let cached updates rewrite owned records. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go collection sequence tests increment in offline inspectable and reversible collection interface. Learners progress throug…

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
